scenes.prompt: Photorealistic cinematic photograph of an American diner interior matching image1 layout. Male clerk (image2) in white button-up shirt and black pants sorts receipts behind the register, talking to brunette young woman (image3) in cream cable-knit sweater and dark wash jeans who sits on a counter stool on the right facing him. Customers seated in red booths. Warm morning light.
